snippet.title: Cisco CEO Chuck Robbins on Splunk acquisition: Deal will add $4 billion in annual recurring revenue
snippet.description:
Cisco chairman and CEO Chuck Robbins and Splunk CEO Gary Steele join 'Squawk on the Street' to discuss Cisco's acquisition of cybersecurity software company Splunk for $157 a share in a cash deal worth $28 billion, why Splunk decided to sell the company, the growth opportunity ahead, and more. For access to live and exclusive video from CNBC subscribe to CNBC PRO: https://cnb.cx/2NGeIvi

snippet.title: Cisco Chairman and CEO Mr Chuck Robbins exclusive interview to PTI
snippet.description:
As US network gear maker Cisco announced plans for manufacturing products like routers and switches in India, its chairman and CEO Chuck Robbins told PTI in an exclusive interview that the country has made remarkable progress on digital infrastructure, and termed India as the number one growth opportunity over next decade.

Watch the full video here.

snippet.title: Principals Live with Cisco Chair and CEO Chuck Robbins | Semafor
snippet.description:
Semafor Founding Editor at Large Steve Clemons sits down with Chuck Robbins, Chair and CEO of Cisco Systems, for a 1:1 interview. 

This live event brings Semafor's top DC newsletter to the stage with a rapid-fire conversation on everything from the rebounding tech sector and investments in AI, to how connectivity and bridging the digital divide can serve as economic drivers.

localized.title: Principals Live with Cisco Chair and CEO Chuck Robbins | Semafor

snippet.description:
